scope: Auth-ish and session-coupled extra query-key sanity sweep on the current anonymous canonical tested branches
verdict: Across the tested anonymous canonical branches, adding `token/sign/sig/appver/access_token/authkey/openid` produced no observed change on API1 XML, API2 XML, or API2 JSONP.
For API2 JSONP specifically, none of those keys changed the wrapper root, content type, or top-level `errorno` away from the baseline `QZOutputJson=...;` family.
This closes a first anonymous-branch auth-ish sweep and narrows the remaining question to real-session or login-coupled environments rather than the current anonymous query parser.
The remaining gap is not whether these keys obviously branch under the anonymous baseline, but whether any of them become meaningful only when replayed with real cookie jars or logged-in state.
